platform.name: NexusAI
platform.description: Managed AI agent SaaS providing personal AI assistants through containerized, multi-channel deployment
platform.infrastructure: AWS ECS Fargate (containerized, one container per agent)

agents.name: Aria
agents.description: Your ultimate productivity partner. Calendar management, email triage, task prioritization, and workflow optimization.

agents.name: Marcus
agents.description: Operations mastermind. Inventory tracking, customer support triage, invoicing, CRM management, and operational intelligence.

agents.name: Nova
agents.description: Creative powerhouse. Social media management, content drafting, brand voice consistency, and marketing automation.

agents.name: Kai
agents.description: Technical companion. GitHub integration, DevOps automation, code review assistance, and infrastructure monitoring.

agents.name: Lexis
agents.description: Legal assistant for contract review, compliance tracking, and regulatory updates.

agents.name: Finley
agents.description: Financial analyst and bookkeeper. Revenue tracking, expense categorization, financial reporting, and tax prep.

agents.name: Storefront
agents.description: Retail operations expert. Inventory management, order processing, customer inquiries, and sales analytics.

agents.name: Sage
agents.description: Hospitality concierge. Booking management, guest communications, review responses, and service quality tracking.

brainTiers.name: Spark
brainTiers.description: Perfect for getting started. Basic automation and simple tasks.

brainTiers.name: Core
brainTiers.description: Smart model routing for balanced cost and capability.

brainTiers.name: Pro
brainTiers.description: Professional-grade intelligence for complex business operations.

brainTiers.name: Ultra
brainTiers.description: Maximum intelligence for demanding autonomous operations.

brainTiers.name: Apex
brainTiers.description: Enterprise-grade with no limits. Full model access and priority support.
